title: Zomato Restaurant Scraper Output
description: One dataset record per scraped Zomato restaurant (name, URL, phone, address, cuisines, rating, cost for two, city, area) plus a final summary record with aggregate counts and the source URL.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: Restaurant records (recordType=restaurant) plus a final summary record (recordType=summary). Filter by recordType=restaurant for clean table view.
